scripts.install:all: npm --prefix auth-service install && npm --prefix resource-service install && npm --prefix notification-service install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n auth,resource,notif,front -c blue,green,magenta,cyan "npm --prefix auth-service start" "npm --prefix resource-service start" "npm --prefix notification-service start" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
